title: Chief Strategy Officer
summary: The strategy leader responsible for long-range direction, market logic, expansion sequencing, and institutional positioning.
biography: This executive seat is available. Neuroartan has defined the Chief Strategy Officer role as a real operating standard before appointing a public holder.
The strategy leader responsible for long-range direction, market logic, expansion sequencing, and institutional positioning.
The public profile is intentionally role-first until a human executive is hired, verified, and approved for publication.
mandate: Shape the company’s strategic architecture so product, research, software, governance, and public positioning develop in the right order.
source_posture: Governed role placeholder for future executive hiring
